nodes.label: CI Workflow (ci.yml — full cross-OS gate)
nodes.rationale: Single test job runs pytest, ruff, mypy, pip-audit, a public safety scan, package build + release preflight, desktop QML smoke (offscreen Qt), and CLI smoke on every push/PR; separate ubuntu-only Docker build smoke validates the container image.

nodes.label: Cross-OS CI Test Matrix
nodes.rationale: ci.yml tests ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest across Python 3.10/3.11/3.12/3.13 with fail-fast disabled, so per-OS breakage surfaces independently. Linux is covered via ubuntu-latest in both workflows; test.yml adds no OS coverage beyond Linux.

hyperedges.label: CI/Release Quality Gate (pytest + ruff + mypy + pip-audit + safety scan)
